title: agrostis castellana
intro: Agrostis castellana, also known as Spanish bent or Agrostis canina, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis castellana include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Agrostis castellana is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to extract its medicinal properties.
